data.name: request.route.idMismatch
data.value: The route identifier does not match the request body.

data.name: deliverable.publishedUrl.required
data.value: The published URL is required for published deliverables.

data.name: campaignCreator.duplicate
data.value: The creator is already linked to this campaign.

data.name: deliverableApproval.duplicateType
data.value: An approval of this type already exists for the informed deliverable.

data.name: email.configuration.invalid
data.value: Email configuration is not valid for sending documents.

data.name: proposal.responsibleUser.required
data.value: The proposal requires a valid commercial responsible. Assign a responsible to the opportunity or provide one in the proposal itself.

data.name: campaignDocument.body.required
data.value: The document needs content (generated body or URL) before being sent for signature.

data.name: webhook.secret.notConfigured
data.value: Webhook endpoint is not configured. Set Webhooks:ProviderCallbackSecret in appsettings.

data.name: creatorPortal.token.invalid
data.value: Access link is invalid, expired or revoked.

data.name: campaignCreatorStatus.initial.duplicate
data.value: An initial status is already configured.

data.name: deliverable.publish.brandApprovalRequired
data.value: Deliverable can only be published after brand approval.

data.name: commercialPipelineStage.initial.duplicate
data.value: An initial stage is already configured for the commercial pipeline.

data.name: commercialPipelineStage.initial.missing
data.value: No active stage configured for the commercial pipeline.

data.name: commercialPipelineStage.final.missing
data.value: No final stage configured for the commercial pipeline.

data.name: imageUpload.fileType.unsupported
data.value: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

data.name: financialEntry.installments.totalRequired
data.value: To generate installments, the total must be greater than 1.

data.name: financialAccount.hasEntries.cannotDelete
data.value: Account has linked entries; deactivate instead of deleting.

data.name: opportunityApproval.notPending
data.value: Only pending approval requests can be decided.

data.name: opportunityComment.delete.onlyAuthor
data.value: Only the comment author can delete it.

data.name: integrationPlatform.notConfigured
data.value: Integration 'integration-platform' is not configured for this tenant.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.getFailed
data.value: Failed to get connector from IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.createFailed
data.value: Failed to create connector on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.updateFailed
data.value: Failed to update connector on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connector.deleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete connector on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connectorAttribute.createFailed
data.value: Failed to create connector attribute value on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.connectorAttribute.updateFailed
data.value: Failed to update connector attribute value on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.pipeline.executeFailed
data.value: Failed to execute pipeline on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: integrationPlatform.pipeline.enqueueFailed
data.value: Failed to enqueue pipeline on IntegrationPlatform.

data.name: dashboard.revenue.empty
data.value: No revenue recorded in the last 12 months.

data.name: brands.subtitle
data.value: Register and manage the brands served by the agency

data.name: brands.preview.description
data.value: Quick summary of the selected brand

data.name: creators.subtitle
data.value: Register and track the agency's creator base

data.name: creators.preview.description
data.value: Quick summary of the selected creator

data.name: campaigns.subtitle
data.value: Manage campaigns, casting, deliverables and operations

data.name: approvals.subtitle
data.value: Center to approve or reject commercial exceptions for discount, margin, deadline and special conditions

data.name: approvals.decision.approved
data.value: Approval made by the Approvals Center.

data.name: approvals.decision.rejected
data.value: Rejection made by the Approvals Center.

data.name: pipeline.subtitle
data.value: Track leads and opportunities by stage, value in the funnel and critical follow-ups

data.name: pipeline.alert.overdue
data.value: There are overdue follow-ups in the pipeline. Prioritize these cards.

data.name: pipeline.stage.defaultDescription
data.value: Configurable stage of the commercial funnel.

data.name: pipeline.empty.description
data.value: Register leads to see the commercial funnel by stage, estimated value and follow-ups.

data.name: proposals.subtitle
data.value: Manage proposals, links to opportunities and conversion to campaigns

data.name: proposals.empty.filtered
data.value: No proposals found with current filters

data.name: proposals.search.placeholder
data.value: Search by proposal, brand or opportunity...

data.name: opportunities.subtitle
data.value: Manage the commercial funnel and track proposals, negotiations and follow-ups

data.name: opportunities.empty.filtered
data.value: No opportunities found with current filters

data.name: opportunities.search.placeholder
data.value: Search by name, brand, contact or email...

data.name: followups.subtitle
data.value: Commercial agenda — overdue, today, upcoming and completed

data.name: followups.empty.overdue.subtitle
data.value: Nice job! You're up to date.

data.name: followups.empty.today.subtitle
data.value: Use the time to get ahead on upcoming activities.

data.name: followups.empty.upcoming.subtitle
data.value: Create follow-ups inside opportunities to keep the rhythm.

data.name: followups.empty.completed.subtitle
data.value: When you mark one as completed, it shows up here.

data.name: proposalShare.confirm.revoke
data.value: Revoke this link? Anyone who already opened it will lose access.

data.name: proposalShare.generate.description
data.value: The link sends the client straight to the latest version of the proposal. No login, with view tracking.

data.name: proposalShare.versions.empty
data.value: No version registered. Each time you click Send a new version is automatically generated.

data.name: opportunityActivity.placeholder
data.value: Write an internal comment about this opportunity...

data.name: proposalDetail.items.empty
data.value: No items registered for this proposal

data.name: proposalDetail.convert.description
data.value: Link this approved proposal to an existing campaign. Items already registered will be referenced by the campaign.

data.name: opportunityDetail.proposals.description
data.value: Each proposal has items (creators, platforms, values), PDF, public link, status and conversion into campaign. Click a row to open the full detail.

data.name: opportunityDetail.proposals.empty
data.value: No proposals linked. Use the New proposal button above to create the first one.

data.name: opportunityDetail.negotiations.description
data.value: Each negotiation records a round of offer with value and reason (initial proposal, counter offer, discount adjustment). Select one to edit or request internal approval.

data.name: opportunityDetail.negotiations.title.request
data.value: Request internal approval for this negotiation

data.name: opportunityDetail.approvals.description
data.value: Approvals are created from negotiations. Go to Negotiations tab, select one and click "Request approval".

data.name: opportunityDetail.approvals.empty
data.value: No approval recorded. Create one from a negotiation in the Negotiations tab.

data.name: opportunityDetail.approvals.decision.approved
data.value: Approval made in the commercial flow.

data.name: opportunityDetail.followups.description
data.value: Commitments and tasks for this opportunity (calls, proposal sending, returns). Mark as completed after each contact to keep history.

data.name: creators.detail.noCampaigns
data.value: Creator has not participated in any campaigns yet

data.name: campaign.detail.noCreators
data.value: No creator linked to this campaign

data.name: configuration.agency.logoError.format
data.value: Invalid format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

data.name: configuration.creatorStatuses.subtitle
data.value: Creator stages within the campaign (invited, accepted, in production, published).

data.name: configuration.contractTemplates.subtitle
data.value: Contracts and terms with variables filled automatically when generating the campaign document.

data.name: configuration.commercialFunnel.subtitle
data.value: Pipeline stages (Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost).

data.name: configuration.deliverableKinds.subtitle
data.value: Register and organize the deliverable types available for campaigns.

data.name: configuration.emailTemplates.subtitle
data.value: Templates triggered automatically on proposal and opportunity events.

data.name: configuration.bankAccounts.subtitle
data.value: Cash, bank accounts and cards used in financial entries.

data.name: configuration.financialSubcategories.subtitle
data.value: Custom subcategories to detail financial entries.

data.name: configuration.integrations.subtitle
data.value: Connect external accounts and configure automatic actions for Kanvas events.

data.name: configuration.opportunitySources.subtitle
data.value: Where your leads come from. Use for channel analysis and reports.

data.name: configuration.opportunityTags.subtitle
data.value: Custom labels (strategic, hot, Q4, etc.) to classify deals.

data.name: configuration.proposalBlocks.subtitle
data.value: Reusable clauses, conditions and descriptions to build proposals.

data.name: configuration.proposalTemplates.subtitle
data.value: Reusable templates with standard items to speed up proposal creation.

data.name: configuration.proposalTemplate.subtitle
data.value: Customize the proposal PDF layout with HTML and CSS.

data.name: configuration.dashboard.automationsByModule.subtitle
data.value: Distribution of active ones by the triggering event

data.name: financial.aging.subtitle
data.value: Distribution of pending entries by overdue range

data.name: financial.cashFlow.subtitle
data.value: Projected and actual inflows and outflows for the period

data.name: financial.creatorPayments.subtitle
data.value: Manage individual and batch payments, attach invoices and trigger via gateway.

data.name: financial.entries.placeholder.search
data.value: Search by description, counterpart or reference

data.name: financial.payables.subtitle
data.value: Creator payments, suppliers, taxes and operating expenses.

data.name: financial.receivables.subtitle
data.value: Agency inflow entries: brand, bonuses and adjustments.

data.name: operations.approvals.subtitle
data.value: Deliverables awaiting brand approval before publishing

data.name: public.deliverable.invalidLink.message
data.value: Request a new approval link from the agency.

data.name: modal.automation.placeholder.noAccounts
data.value: No connected accounts in this category

data.name: modal.automation.hint.connectFirst
data.value: Connect an account first in Settings → Integrations.

data.name: modal.applyProposalTemplate.description
data.value: Template items will be added to the proposal. Existing items are not removed.

data.name: modal.document.noTemplate
data.value: This document was not generated from a template. Use the URL above to access the original content.

data.name: modal.document.placeholder.noTemplates
data.value: No active templates for this type

data.name: modal.creator.photo.error.invalidFormat
data.value: Invalid format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

data.name: modal.emailTemplate.placeholder.noVariables
data.value: No variables available for this event.

data.name: modal.opportunity.placeholder.noTags
data.value: No tags registered. Create in Settings → Opportunity tags.

data.name: modal.proposalBlock.description
data.value: Clauses, commercial terms, standard descriptions. Use blocks to insert ready snippets in the proposal editor.

data.name: modal.proposalTemplate.description
data.value: Define a reusable model with standard proposal items. When applied to a deal, items are copied to the proposal.

data.name: common.state.adjustFilters
data.value: Adjust the filters or add a new record.

data.name: financial.entries.emptyReceivable
data.value: No receivable entries in the period.

data.name: financial.entries.emptyPayable
data.value: No payable entries in the period.

data.name: configuration.bankAccounts.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete account "{0}"? If there are entries, prefer to deactivate.

data.name: configuration.commercialFunnel.empty
data.value: No stages configured for the commercial pipeline

data.name: configuration.proposalTemplates.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete template "{0}"? Items already copied to proposals will remain there.

data.name: automations.empty.description
data.value: Create automations to run pipelines when events occur in Kanvas.

data.name: creators.detail.empty.deliverables
data.value: No deliverables registered for this creator
